title: lobelia zeylanica var. hirta
intro: Lobelia zeylanica var. hirta, also known as Indian tobacco or glabrous lobelia, is a plant species that belongs to the Lobeliaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and act as an antispasmodic to calm muscle spasms. Lobelia zeylanica var. hirta is traditionally prepared as an herbal smoke or in teas to harness its medicinal properties.
